description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed female figure standing on a rectangular pedestal. The figure is draped in flowing, textured garments with deep folds, and her arms are extended outward, creating a sense of openness and grace. The head is covered with a veil, and the facial features are serene and contemplative. The surface of the sculpture shows signs of weathering, with a patina of earthy tones and some discoloration, suggesting age or outdoor exposure. The base is solid and slightly wider than the figure, providing stability. The overall impression is one of solemnity and reverence, typical of religious or commemorative statuary.
description: A weathered, veiled female figure in flowing robes stands with arms outstretched on a rectangular pedestal, exuding solemnity and grace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the draped folds of the robe and the profile of the veiled head.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full length of the robe, the veil, and the back of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the arm and robe extended, revealing the side profile and garment texture.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the outstretched arms, serene face, and detailed drapery of the robe.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
